    Public Function DelSpace(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next

        tmp = tmp & Chr(13)
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Function NullCheck(ByVal strVal) As String

        Dim tmp As String
        Try
            tmp = strVal
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmp = "0"
        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Function Asc2PrinterStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        If Len(str) > 2 Then
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(str)
                If Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 4 Then 'EOT
                    tmp = tmp & EOT
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 30 Then 'RS
                    tmp = tmp & RS
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 29 Then 'GS
                    tmp = tmp & GS
                Else
                    tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
                End If
            Next
        Else
        End If
        If tmp = "" Then
        Else
            tmp = "#" & tmp
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckPing(ByVal strAddress As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Try
            tmp = My.Computer.Network.Ping(strAddress)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckFolder(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean

        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try

    End Function

    Function CheckFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub MakeFolder(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub WriteFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub MakeFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public tmpFileName As String

    Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal strMsg As String, ByVal strType As String)

        'FrmMain.Appendlog(strMsg)
        Dim flagSave = True
        Dim tmpLogFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
        Dim Tmpdtp As String = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & vbTab
        Dim SaveStep As Integer = 0

        If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True And CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
            WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
        Else
            Try
                Do
                    If SaveStep = 0 Then
                        If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = False Then
                            MakeFolder(tmpLogFolder)
                            SaveStep = 1
                        Else
                            SaveStep = 1
                        End If
                    ElseIf SaveStep = 1 Then
                        If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True Then
                            SaveStep = 2
                        End If
                    ElseIf SaveStep = 2 Then
                        If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = False Then
                            MakeFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt")
                            SaveStep = 3
                        Else
                            SaveStep = 3
                        End If
                    ElseIf SaveStep = 3 Then
                        If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
                            SaveStep = 4
                        End If
                    ElseIf SaveStep = 4 Then
                        WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
                        Exit Do
                    End If
                    Application.DoEvents()
                Loop
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub ExecuteQurryMDB(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ExecuteQurrySQL(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Try
            SqlConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseSQL()

    End Sub

    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

End Module

content.text:
완료. 배포 방법 정리:

---

## 배포 방법

### 1. 빌드
기존 빌드 환경(Advantech DAQ 설치된 PC)에서 빌드

### 2. 스테이지 1 PC (JIG#10)
Release 폴더 전체 복사 후, 실행파일 옆에 `config.ini` 생성:
```ini
[PLC]
InSignalStartAddress=4090
OutSignalStartAddress=4093
```

### 3. 스테이지 2 PC (JIG#11)
동일하게 Release 폴더 복사 후, `config.ini`만 다르게:
```ini
[PLC]
InSignalStartAddress=4100
OutSignalStartAddress=4103
```

### 4. 나머지 설정
각 PC의 `DB\DB.mdb` → `Table_SET`에서:
- **PLC IP** — 동일 (192.168.0.110)
- **COM 포트** — 각 PC에 연결된 장비에 맞게
- **LineName** — 구분 필요 시 변경 (예: `JIG#10 NOISE TEST` / `JIG#11 NOISE TEST`)

**config.ini가 없으면** 기본값 4090/4093(스테이지 1)으로 동작합니다.

message.content: frmset 에서 설정하면 되제

content.text:
네, FrmSet에서 TextBox1/TextBox2로 PLC 주소를 변경하면 `SaveSetData()` → `WriteIni()`로 config.ini에 저장됩니다. 프로그램 재시작 시 `LoadSetData()` → `ReadIni()`로 읽어오고요.

현장에서 FrmSet 열어서 주소만 바꾸면 됩니다.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User wants to use the NoiseTestJG (NoiseTest_ConvJG.vbproj) program on **two PCs** simultaneously, each connected to a different stage (JIG#10 and JIG#11) of the noise test system
   - PLC addresses need to be configurable per-PC via **INI file** instead of MDB database
   - Stage 1 (JIG#10): InSignalStartAddress=4090, OutSignalStartAddress=4093
   - Stage 2 (JIG#11): InSignalStartAddress=4100, OutSignalStartAddress=4103
   - Along the way, a bug was discovered and fixed where JIG#10 code was incorrectly writing to JIG#11's PLC address space

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - VB.NET .NET Framework 4.8 WinForms project (NoiseTest_ConvJG.vbproj)
   - Mitsubishi PLC communication via MX Component ActiveX (ActPlc)
   - PLC D-register address mapping: JIG#10 (D4090-D4094), JIG#11 (D4100-D4104)
   - `PlcInSignalStartAddress` / `PlcOutSignalStartAddress` as base addresses with offset-based access throughout code
   - Windows API kernel32 `GetPrivateProfileString` / `WritePrivateProfileString` for INI file handling
   - wStep state machine for test flow control
   - MDB (Access) database for other settings (Table_SET), SQL Server for production data (Table_Main)
   - PLC program: U005_.st (Section#5 - JIG#10~11 Unload Room)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\NoiseTestJG\Module1.vb**
     - Core module with global variables, DB connections, settings load/save
     - Added INI file read/write functions and changed PLC address loading from MDB to INI
     - Changes made:
       1. Added `Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices`
       2. Added kernel32 DllImport declarations for `GetPrivateProfileString` and `WritePrivateProfileString`
       3. Added `IniFilePath`, `ReadIni()`, `WriteIni()` public members
       4. In `LoadSetData()`: Changed PLC address loading from MDB to INI
       5. In `SaveSetData()`: Changed PLC address saving from MDB to INI
     - Added code at top of module:
       ```vb
       Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
       
       ' INI file read/write via Windows API
       <DllImport("kernel32", CharSet:=CharSet.Unicode)>
       Private Function GetPrivateProfileString(
           lpAppName As String, lpKeyName As String, lpDefault As String,
           lpReturnedString As StringBuilder, nSize As Integer, lpFileName As String) As Integer
       End Function

       <DllImport("kernel32", CharSet:=CharSet.Unicode)>
       Private Function WritePrivateProfileString(
           lpAppName As String, lpKeyName As String, lpString As String, lpFileName As String) As Boolean
       End Function

       Public ReadOnly IniFilePath As String = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "config.ini")

       Public Function ReadIni(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String) As String
           Dim sb As New StringBuilder(256)
           GetPrivateProfileString(section, key, defaultValue, sb, sb.Capacity, IniFilePath)
           Return sb.ToString()
       End Function

       Public Sub WriteIni(section As String, key As String, value As String)
           WritePrivateProfileString(section, key, value, IniFilePath)
       End Sub
       ```
     - In `LoadSetData()` changed:
       ```vb
       ' PLC address loaded from config.ini (not MDB)
       PlcInSignalStartAddress = CInt(ReadIni("PLC", "InSignalStartAddress", "4090"))
       PlcOutSignalStartAddress = CInt(ReadIni("PLC", "OutSignalStartAddress", "4093"))
       ```
     - In `SaveSetData()` changed:
       ```vb
       ' PLC address saved to config.ini (not MDB)
       WriteIni("PLC", "InSignalStartAddress", CStr(PlcInSignalStartAddress))
       WriteIni("PLC", "OutSignalStartAddress", CStr(PlcOutSignalStartAddress))
       ```

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\NoiseTestJG\FrmMain.vb**
     - Main form with wStep state machine, PLC communication, test flow
     - Very large file (~56744 tokens)
     - Bug fix at line 847: Changed JIG#11 address write to correct JIG#10 address
     - Changed from:
       ```vb
       WritePlcMelsec("W", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 10, "2")
       wStep = 2.82
       ```
     - Changed to:
       ```vb
       WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2, True) ' Work End signal
       wStep = 2.82
       ```
     - Key PLC communication functions: `ConnectPlc()`, `ReadPlcMelsec()`, `WritePlcMelsec()`, `WritePlcBit()`, `WritePlcBits()`
     - Timer calls `ReadPlcMelsec(PlcInSignalStartAddress, 3, PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2)` at line 2350

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\NoiseTestJG\FrmSet.vb**
     - Settings form - NOT modified, already has TextBox1/TextBox2 for PLC addresses
     - Load: `TextBox1.Text = CStr(PlcInSignalStartAddress)` / `TextBox2.Text = CStr(PlcOutSignalStartAddress)`
     - Save: `PlcInSignalStartAddress = CInt(TextBox1.Text)` / `PlcOutSignalStartAddress = CInt(TextBox2.Text)` then calls `SaveSetData()` which now writes to INI

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\NoiseTestJG\bin\Debug\config.ini**
     - Created new INI file with Stage 1 defaults:
       ```ini
       [PLC]
       InSignalStartAddress=4090
       OutSignalStartAddress=4093
       ```

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PLC\COMMENT.csv**
     - PLC device comments confirming D-register mapping
     - JIG#10: D4091 (PLC→PC), D4092 (PLC→PC spare), D4093 (PC→PLC), D4094 (PC→PLC Spec_Sig)
     - JIG#11: D4101 (PLC→PC), D4102 (PLC→PC spare), D4103 (PC→PLC), D4104 (PC→PLC Spec_Sig)
     - D4090 and D4100 have no PLC comments (unused)

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\PLC\ST_OUTPUT\U005_.st**
     - Section#5 PLC code confirming D register usage:
       ```
       D4091 := K4M21000;  // MOV  // U_JIG#10PLC>>PC
       D4092 := K4M21020;  // MOV  // U_JIG#10PLC>>PC
       K4M21050 := D4093;  // MOV
       K4M21070 := D4094;  // MOV
       K4M21150 := D4103;  // MOV
       ```

   - **C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\NoiseTestJG\bin\Debug\DB\DB.mdb**
     - Table_SET: PlcInSignalStartAddress=4090, PlcOutSignalStartAddress=4093, PLC IP=192.168.0.110, ColumnTitle=OP60

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Build failure (Automation.BDaq.dll not found)**: MSB3103 error on FrmMain.resx. This is a pre-existing issue — Advantech DAQ driver not installed on the development PC. Build must be done on a PC with the driver installed. Not related to our changes.
   - **Bug: PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 10 writing to wrong JIG area**: At FrmMain.vb line 847, `WritePlcMelsec("W", PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 10, "2")` was writing to D4103 (JIG#11 PC→PLC area) from JIG#10's RFID NG handler. User confirmed "버그임". Fixed by changing to `WritePlcBit("D", PlcOutSignalStartAddress, 2, True)` which correctly writes to D4093.2 (Work End signal).
   - **INI default value mismatch**: Initially set default to "4091" but should be "4090" to match the actual base address. Fixed to "4090".
   - **User feedback - overcomplicating**: User said "정지", "뭐가 오해하고 있는거같은데", "그대로 쓰면 되는거겠는디" — I was over-analyzing whether all PLC code needed modification. The code already uses variable-based offsets everywhere, so no code changes were needed beyond the INI loading mechanism.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved: PLC address configuration moved from MDB to INI file for per-PC configuration
   - Solved: Verified all PLC communication code uses offset-based addressing from base variables — no hardcoded addresses
   - Solved: Verified PLC D-register mapping matches between VB code and PLC program (U005_.st, COMMENT.csv)
   - Solved: Found and fixed D4103 write bug in RFID NG handler
   - Solved: Deployment strategy — same program, different config.ini per PC, FrmSet UI for address changes

6. All user messages:
   - "DAEIL_JG noisetset" (initial request via /clear command)
   - "NoiseTest_ConvJG.vbproj"
   - "방음실 프로젝트가 두개의 스테이지에서 한 프로그램으로 사용하려고하"
   - "지금 피엘시랑 통신하는 번지가 in-4091 , out- 4093 맞나 ?"
   - "피씨 두개 같은 프로그램으로 사용하려고 스테이지가 틀려서 PLC 랑 통신하는 번지가 각각 세팅되야함"
   - "저장하는 컬럼은 일치해도되고"
   - "PLC 주소만 각각 관려되면 되면 됨 이건 ini 파일로 관리하게 하자 하나는 4091/4093 //// 하나는 4101/4103"
   - "지금 trmwork 및 코드에서 plc 통신하는 모든 코드 수정해야할텐데"
   - "다 확인해봐라"
   - "일단 지금"
   - "쓰고 있는 주소부터 다시 확인해봐"
   - "정지"
   - "뭐가 오해하고 있는거같은데"
   - "그대로 쓰면 되는거겠는디"
   - "좀 헷갈리는데 기존 쓰던 주소는 뭐엿지 ?"
   - "plc 폴더에서 주고 있는 신호랑 맞는지 확인해줘"
   - "문제 발견: 현재 코드에서 PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 10 = D4103을 쓰고 있는데, 이건 JIG#11의 PC→PLC 주소입니다. 스테이지 1(JIG#10)에서 JIG#11 영역에 쓰고 있는 건 의도된 건가요? - 버그임"
   - "1" (choosing fix option 1)
   - "확정하고 . 파일 옮기고 설정으 어떻게 하면 되나"
   - "frmset 에서 설정하면 되제"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Build the project on a PC with Advantech DAQ driver installed (cannot build on current PC)
   - Deploy to two PCs with different config.ini files
   - No code changes remaining

8. Current Work:
   All code modifications are complete. The conversation ended with the user confirming that FrmSet can be used for PLC address settings at runtime. The user said "frmset 에서 설정하면 되제" and I confirmed that FrmSet TextBox1/TextBox2 → SaveSetData() → WriteIni() → config.ini works correctly.

   Summary of all changes made:
   - Module1.vb: Added INI read/write functions, PLC addresses now load/save via config.ini
   - FrmMain.vb line 847: Fixed D4103 bug → WritePlcBit to D4093.2
   - config.ini: Created with Stage 1 defaults (4090/4093)

9. Optional Next Step:
   No pending tasks from user. All requested work is complete. The project needs to be built on a PC with Advantech DAQ driver, then deployed to two PCs with appropriate config.ini values. User may want to commit these changes to git.

content.text:
csproj에서 `Intel.RealSense.dll`과 `realsense2.dll`을 `D:\Source\RealSense\lib\` 경로에서 참조하고 있는데 해당 경로에 파일이 없는 상황이네요.

Intel RealSense SDK는 GitHub `IntelRealSense/librealsense`에 있습니다. .NET wrapper가 포함되어 있어요.

어떻게 진행할까요:

1. **GitHub에서 librealsense 릴리즈 다운로드** → `Intel.RealSense.dll` + `realsense2.dll` 추출
2. **NuGet 패키지로 변경** → csproj에서 NuGet 참조로 전환 (더 깔끔)

어떤 방식으로 할까요? NuGet에 `Intel.RealSense` 패키지가 있으면 그쪽이 관리하기 편합니다.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about RealSense2 .NET wrapper NuGet packages with realsense2.dll:

## NuGet Packages Available

There are several NuGet packages available for RealSense2 .NET integration:

1. **Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll** - This package automatically copies the required native realsense2.dll from Intel® RealSense™ SDK 2.0 (latest build 2.51.1 from April 21, 2021), and is compatible with .NET 5.0, .NET 6, and .NET 7.

2. **DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense** - This package contains Intel.RealSense.dll and realsense2.dll and targets .NET Framework 3.5 and higher.

3. **RealSense.Net** - A .NET interface for the Intel RealSense cross-platform API targeting .NET Framework 4.5.

## Working with the .NET Wrapper

To work with Intel RealSense from .NET you will need two libraries next to your application - realsense2 and Intel.RealSense.dll. You can obtain the native realsense2 library either by building the SDK from source using CMake or installing the latest release.

The official documentation and examples are available on GitHub at the Intel RealSense librealsense repository's C# wrapper section.

2. **DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense** - Contains Intel.RealSense.dll and realsense2.dll (version 2.49.3, targets .NET Framework 3.5 and higher)

3. **Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll** - Intel® RealSense™ SDK 2.0 is a cross-platform library for Intel® RealSense™ depth cameras (D400 series and the SR300) and the T265 tracking camera (version 2.51.1.1)

# Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll 2.51.1.1 Package Details

## Package Information
This is a wrapper for Intel® RealSense™ SDK 2.0, targeting .NET 5.0 and compatible with .NET 6, 7, 8, 9, and 10.

## Key Feature
According to the package description, "This version automatically copies the required native realsense2.dll from Intel® RealSense™ SDK 2.0." The package includes build 2.51.1 from April 21, 2021.

## Dependencies
**No dependencies** – the package has no external NuGet dependencies listed.

## Native DLL Inclusion
Yes, the realsense2.dll is included. The package automatically handles copying this native library, which is essential for working with Intel RealSense depth cameras (D400 series, SR300) and T265 tracking cameras.

## License & Downloads
- **License:** Apache-2.0
- **Package size:** 10.52 MB
- **Total downloads:** 41.6K (19.1K for current version as of 12/6/2022)

# DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense Package Details

## Overview
This NuGet package (version 2.49.3) is a wrapper for Intel RealSense functionality in .NET applications. According to the package description, it "contains Intel.RealSense.dll and realsense2.dll."

## Target Frameworks
The package supports:
- **.NET Framework 3.5** and higher versions (through net481)
- **.NETPlatform 5.0**

## Dependencies
Both the .NET Framework 3.5 and .NETPlatform 5.0 versions have **no dependencies**, meaning it's self-contained.

## Package Information
- **License**: MIT
- **Last Updated**: August 24, 2022
- **Downloads**: 1,324 (current version); 6.1K total across all versions
- **Package Size**: 9.15 MB
- **Owners**: VLT_Emma and RoelBalinkVLT

## Usage Status
The package is not actively used by other NuGet packages or popular GitHub repositories according to the provided data.

## Notes
Earlier versions (2.49.1 and 2.49.0) are marked as deprecated due to critical bugs, making 2.49.3 the recommended stable release.

GitHub도 접근 제한이 있네요. 검색 결과를 기반으로 정리하겠습니다.

## Intel RealSense NuGet 패키지 검색 결과

### 주요 패키지 3가지

| 패키지명 | 최신 버전 | 대상 플랫폼 | 특징 |
|---------|---------|---------|------|
| **Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll** | 2.51.1.1 | .NET 5.0+ (6, 7, 8, 9, 10 호환) | realsense2.dll **자동 포함** ✓ |
| **DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense** | 2.49.3 | .NET Framework 3.5+ | Intel.RealSense.dll + realsense2.dll **포함** ✓ |
| **RealSense.Net** | 0.2.0 | .NET Framework 4.5 | 간단한 래퍼 (오래됨 - 2017) |

### 추천 선택

**프로젝트 대상에 따라:**

1. **.NET Framework 4.8 프로젝트** (귀사 Assemble 310)
   - `DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense 2.49.3` 권장
   - Intel.RealSense.dll + realsense2.dll 모두 포함
   - .NET Framework 3.5 이상 지원

2. **.NET 5.0 이상** 신규 프로젝트
   - `Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll 2.51.1.1` 권장
   - realsense2.dll 자동 복사 (빌드 최적화)
   - 더 최신 SDK 버전 (2.51.1, 2021년 4월)

### 패키지 상세 정보

**DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense 2.49.3**
- 크기: 9.15 MB
- 라이선스: MIT
- 외부 의존성: 없음 (self-contained)
- 마지막 업데이트: 2022-08-24
- 이전 버전 2.49.0, 2.49.1 제외 (critical bugs)

**Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll 2.51.1.1**
- 크기: 10.52 MB
- 라이선스: Apache-2.0
- 외부 의존성: 없음 (self-contained)
- SDK 빌드: 2021-04-21 (2.51.1)

### 설치 명령어

```powershell
# .NET Framework 4.8용
Install-Package DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense -Version 2.49.3

# .NET 5.0+ 용
Install-Package Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll -Version 2.51.1.1
```

Sources:
- [Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll - NuGet Gallery](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Intel.RealSenseWithNativeDll)
- [DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense - NuGet Gallery](https://www.nuget.org/packages/DotNetWrapper.Intel.RealSense)
- [RealSense.Net - NuGet Gallery](https://www.nuget.org/packages/RealSense.Net/)

- [Intel RealSense GitHub C# Wrapper](https://github.com/IntelRealSense/librealsense/tree/master/wrappers/csharp)

  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ApplicationIcon>fauto.ico</ApplicationIcon>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="Intel.RealSense">

  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="MainForm.cs">
      <SubType>Form</SubType>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="MainForm.Designer.cs">
      <DependentUpon>MainForm.cs</DependentUpon>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="RealSenseCamera.cs" />
    <Compile Include="BoltInspector.cs" />
    <Compile Include="FrmRoiSetting.cs">
      <SubType>Form</SubType>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="FrmRoiSetting.Designer.cs">
      <DependentUpon>FrmRoiSetting.cs</DependentUpon>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="FrmSettings.cs">
      <SubType>Form</SubType>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="FrmSettings.Designer.cs">
      <DependentUpon>FrmSettings.cs</DependentUpon>
    </Compile>
    <Compile Include="SocketClient.cs" />
    <Compile Include="ImageSaver.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Program.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
    <EmbeddedResource Include="MainForm.resx">
      <DependentUpon>MainForm.cs</DependentUpon>
    </EmbeddedResource>
    <EmbeddedResource Include="FrmRoiSetting.resx">
      <DependentUpon>FrmRoiSetting.cs</DependentUpon>
    </EmbeddedResource>
    <EmbeddedResource Include="Properties\Resources.resx">
      <Generator>ResXFileCodeGenerator</Generator>
      <LastGenOutput>Resources.Designer.cs</LastGenOutput>
      <SubType>Designer</SubType>
    </EmbeddedResource>
    <Compile Include="Properties\Resources.Designer.cs">
      <AutoGen>True</AutoGen>
      <DependentUpon>Resources.resx</DependentUpon>
      <DesignTime>True</DesignTime>
    </Compile>
    <None Include="Properties\Settings.settings">
      <Generator>SettingsSingleFileGenerator</Generator>
      <LastGenOutput>Settings.Designer.cs</LastGenOutput>
    </None>
    <Compile Include="Properties\Settings.Designer.cs">
      <AutoGen>True</AutoGen>
      <DependentUpon>Settings.settings</DependentUpon>
      <DesignTimeSharedInput>True</DesignTimeSharedInput>
    </Compile>
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <None Include="App.config" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <ContentWithTargetPath Include="D:\Source\RealSense\lib\Intel.RealSense\bin\Debug\realsense2.dll">

      <TargetPath>realsense2.dll</TargetPath>
    </ContentWithTargetPath>
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Content Include="fauto.ico" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>

content.text:
# Build/Publish Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: build-runner
- model: sonnet

## Role
Agent that performs .NET project build and publish, and analyzes/fixes errors when they occur.

## Input
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAEIL_JG\RealSense\RealSenseBoltDetector.csproj /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=x64 (task type + target path, defaults to current directory if omitted)
- `build` — build only
- `publish` — Release publish
- `publish win-x64` — publish with specific RID
- `clean build` — clean build
- `rebuild` — rebuild (clean + build)
- Path: `build C:\path\to\project`

## Actions

### 1. Project Discovery
- Search for `*.sln`, `*.csproj`, `*.vbproj` in specified or current directory
- If multiple found, ask user to select
- Check project SDK type (WinForms/WPF/Console/MAUI/Library, etc.)
- **Build system detection**: Check TargetFramework
  - `net9.0`, `net8.0`, `net6.0`, etc. → `dotnet` CLI
  - `v4.8`, `v4.7.2`, etc. .NET Framework → `MSBuild`

### 2. Build Execution

#### dotnet CLI (.NET Core/5+)
```bash
# Default build
dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# Clean build
dotnet clean "{project_path}" && dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# MAUI Android
dotnet build -c Release -f net9.0-android -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=C:/android-sdk
```

#### MSBuild (.NET Framework)
```bash
# Find MSBuild path via vswhere
$msbuild = & "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1

# Default build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /p:Configuration=Release /restore

# Clean build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /t:Clean,Build /p:Configuration=Release /restore
```

### 3. Publish Execution
```bash
# Default publish
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release

# Self-contained (no .NET runtime needed on target)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained

# Single file
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true

# Trimmed (remove unused assemblies, reduce size)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true
```

### 4. Error Analysis & Fix
On build failure:
1. Classify error messages:
   - **CS codes** (CS0246, CS1061, etc.): Compile errors — missing references, type errors
   - **MSB codes** (MSB3073, MSB4019, etc.): Build system errors — SDK/tool issues
   - **NU codes** (NU1101, NU1605, etc.): NuGet package errors — package restore failures
   - **NETSDK codes**: SDK installation/version issues
2. Identify cause and suggest fix
3. **Fix code only after user confirmation** (no auto-fix)
